manifesto: You are not behind because of where you are from. You are behind because of specific, learnable skills. Every single skill on this list can be learned for free. The gap between you and your dream job is not talent, not connections, not the city you live in — it is just skills and time.

coding.name: HackerRank
coding.note: Industry-standard coding tests. Most companies use HackerRank assessments.

coding.name: LeetCode
coding.note: Best for DSA practice. 250 free problems.

coding.name: Kaggle Competitions
coding.note: Real data science challenges with rankings.

general.name: LinkedIn Skill Assessments
general.note: Free skill badges on your profile — recruiters filter by these.

general.name: Google Skillshop
general.note: Official Google tests — Ads, Analytics, Marketing.

general.name: HubSpot Academy Tests
general.note: Free certifications with actual exam component.

job_categories.label: Software Developer / Programmer
job_categories.min_qualification: Any degree OR strong portfolio with no degree
job_categories.description: Builds software applications, websites, apps. One of the most in-demand and highest-paying entry-level careers in India.

how_to_learn.note: The single best free coding resource. Complete it.
World-famous free course. CS50 certificate is recognised globally.
Best Python YouTube tutorials — clear, practical, free.

skills.self_test: Solve 10 Easy problems on LeetCode. If you can do it, you know Python basics.
skills.paid_option: NPTEL Python course (free audit, ₹1,000 for certificate)

how_to_learn.note: The most popular free DSA roadmap in India. 450+ curated problems.
Best algorithm explanations in India — used by millions of students.
The exact 150 questions most FAANG companies ask in interviews.

skills.self_test: Solve 30 LeetCode Easy and 10 Medium problems. Track your solve rate.
skills.paid_option: Scaler Academy ₹3-4 LPA — high quality but expensive

how_to_learn.note: The best free full-stack web development curriculum. 100% free.
Best CSS teacher on YouTube. Makes CSS actually make sense.

skills.self_test: Build a personal portfolio website. If it looks reasonable and is live, you know enough HTML/CSS.
skills.paid_option: None needed — free resources are sufficient

how_to_learn.note: Official GitHub docs are the best resource. Take 'Git Handbook' first.
Clear Hindi-English explanation of Git for Indian beginners.

skills.self_test: Push your first project to GitHub with a proper README. If you can do this, you know Git basics.
skills.paid_option: None needed

how_to_learn.note: Best React beginner content on YouTube.
Best Django tutorials — perfect for Python learners moving to backend.

skills.self_test: Build and deploy one CRUD web application using the framework. If it works live, you are ready.
skills.paid_option: Udemy courses ₹500-1,500 during sale — worthwhile for framework depth

job_categories.portfolio_requirement: 3 GitHub projects minimum: 1 simple (calculator/to-do app), 1 medium (weather app with API), 1 complex (full-stack CRUD project). Deployed live is essential.
job_categories.first_job_path: Apply to startups first — they care about skills, not tier-1 college. LinkedIn, AngelList, Internshala. Build GitHub profile aggressively before applying.
job_categories.interview_prep: HackerRank company tests + LeetCode 150 + system design basics (YouTube: Gaurav Sen)
job_categories.realistic_timeline: With 4-6 hours daily: 6-12 months from zero to first job-ready.

job_categories.label: Data Analyst
job_categories.description: Analyses data to help businesses make decisions. Uses Excel, SQL, Python, and visualisation tools.

how_to_learn.note: Best free Excel reference — every formula explained clearly.
The best Excel YouTube channel. Teaches real business scenarios.
Free Microsoft official certificate after completion.

skills.self_test: Build a dashboard with VLOOKUP/INDEX-MATCH, Pivot Tables, and conditional formatting using a real dataset from Kaggle.
skills.paid_option: None needed — YouTube is sufficient

how_to_learn.note: Best interactive SQL learning platform. All free.
Industry-standard SQL practice used by analysts at top companies.
Alex the Analyst — the most popular data analyst YouTube channel. Very practical.

skills.self_test: Complete HackerRank SQL badge (Basic → Advanced). If you get Gold, you are interview-ready.
skills.paid_option: DataCamp SQL track ₹2,000/month — good but not necessary

how_to_learn.note: Kaggle courses are completely free with certificates. Trusted by industry.
Best Pandas tutorial playlist on YouTube.
Free cloud Python notebook — no installation needed. Start here.

skills.self_test: Complete a Kaggle Getting Started competition using Pandas. Your submission proves your skills.
skills.paid_option: Coursera Google Data Analytics Certificate ₹4,000 for 6 months — includes Python basics and is job-credible

how_to_learn.note: Power BI Desktop is 100% free. Used in 90% of Indian corporate analytics teams.

how_to_learn.resource: Guy in a Cube YouTube (Power BI)
how_to_learn.note: Best Power BI YouTube channel — real dashboard tutorials.
₹4,800 exam fee. Industry-recognised Power BI certification — worth it for analyst roles.

skills.self_test: Build a 3-page interactive Power BI dashboard from a public dataset. Share it on LinkedIn. That is your portfolio.
skills.paid_option: Tableau Public is free — build 2 dashboards and publish for portfolio

skills.skill: Statistics Basics (Mean, Median, Standard Deviation, Hypothesis Testing)

how_to_learn.note: The best free statistics course. Used by millions. Covers everything you need.
Makes statistics concepts intuitive. P-values, distributions — explained with visuals.

skills.self_test: Explain p-value, correlation, and A/B testing in simple language. If you can explain these clearly, you are ready for analyst interviews.
skills.paid_option: None needed

job_categories.portfolio_requirement: 3 end-to-end projects: 1 Excel dashboard, 1 SQL analysis with findings, 1 Python + Power BI full project. All uploaded to GitHub or published as LinkedIn articles.
job_categories.first_job_path: LinkedIn search 'Data Analyst fresher', 'MIS Executive', 'Business Analyst Trainee'. Internshala for internships. Apply to IT companies, BFSI (banks/finance), and e-commerce.
job_categories.interview_prep: SQL case studies + Excel shortcut fluency + explain your projects clearly. Practice: 'Tell me about a data project where you found an insight'
job_categories.realistic_timeline: 4-6 hours daily: 5-8 months from zero to first job.

job_categories.label: Digital Marketing Executive
job_categories.min_qualification: Any degree or even Class 12 + certifications
job_categories.description: Manages online presence for businesses — SEO, social media, paid ads, email marketing. High growth, remote-friendly, entrepreneurial potential.

how_to_learn.note: Industry-standard free SEO certification from one of the top SEO companies.
Official Google documentation on how search works. Read all of it.
Best free digital marketing YouTube content globally.

skills.self_test: Set up Google Search Console for a website (even a free one). If you can read the data and explain what actions to take, you understand SEO.
skills.paid_option: Semrush Academy free certificates — add to LinkedIn profile

how_to_learn.note: Official Google certificate. 100% free. Recognised by all digital marketing employers.
Best Hindi-language Google Ads tutorials for Indian market context.

skills.self_test: Google Ads certification exam itself is the test — pass it on Skillshop.
skills.paid_option: Meta Blueprint for Facebook Ads certification — also free on blueprint.facebook.com

how_to_learn.note: Official Meta training. Free courses + paid exam (₹5,000). Free courses alone are excellent.
Free HubSpot certificate. Takes only 4 hours but is credible.

skills.self_test: Grow any social media account from 0 to 200 followers in 30 days using organic content strategy. That result is your portfolio.
skills.paid_option: None needed — free certifications are industry-sufficient

how_to_learn.note: Free official Google certification. Every digital marketing job requires GA4 knowledge.
Most practical GA4 tutorials — walks through real reports and analysis.

skills.self_test: Set up GA4 on a test website. Analyse the data and write a 1-page report on user behaviour. That is your portfolio piece.
skills.paid_option: None needed

how_to_learn.note: Free, credible, and takes only one afternoon to complete.
Free Mailchimp account sends 1,000 emails/month free. Practice with a real audience.

skills.self_test: Write and send one email marketing campaign to 10 people. Measure open rate and click rate. That is hands-on experience.
skills.paid_option: None needed

job_categories.portfolio_requirement: Google Analytics certificate + Google Ads certificate + Meta Blueprint + 1 case study (results from growing a social page or running a test ad campaign, even with ₹500 budget). Publish as LinkedIn article.
job_categories.first_job_path: Digital marketing agencies hire freshers aggressively. LinkedIn search 'Digital Marketing Executive', 'SEO Analyst', 'Social Media Manager'. Also: direct approach to any local business — offer free 1-month social media management to build case study.
job_categories.interview_prep: Be able to explain what you would do to increase website traffic for a hypothetical company. Prepare a 2-minute case study from your portfolio.
job_categories.realistic_timeline: 3-6 hours daily: 3-5 months to first job-ready with portfolio.

job_categories.label: Content Writer / Copywriter
job_categories.min_qualification: Any degree. Strong English/Hindi writing ability.
job_categories.description: Creates written content for websites, social media, marketing campaigns, and brands. Increasingly AI-assisted but human creativity and voice remain essential.

how_to_learn.note: The best book on non-fiction writing. Read it once, then re-read your own writing with its lens.
Paste your writing here. It highlights over-complicated sentences. Aim for Grade 8 reading level.
The only way to improve writing is to write. Every day. No substitute.

skills.self_test: Share a piece of writing with 3 people. If they can read it in one pass without re-reading any sentence, your clarity is sufficient.
skills.paid_option: None needed

how_to_learn.resource: Surfer SEO Blog (free SEO writing guide)
how_to_learn.note: The most practical free guide to SEO writing available.
See which search terms bring traffic to any site. Understand intent before writing.

skills.self_test: Write one SEO article targeting a specific keyword. Submit it to a free blog. Check if it appears in Google search within 30 days.
skills.paid_option: None needed — free learning is sufficient

how_to_learn.note: Shows what questions people search online about any topic. Use for content ideas.
Unlimited free 'People Also Ask' data. Great for finding content gaps.

skills.self_test: Research and outline 5 articles on one topic without looking at existing articles first. Then compare to what ranks. How close were you?
skills.paid_option: Ahrefs free tier — 10 free searches/month for keyword research

job_categories.portfolio_requirement: 10 published writing samples across at least 3 formats (blog posts, social media copy, email copy). Published on Medium, LinkedIn, or personal website. Quality over quantity.
job_categories.first_job_path: Internshala, Internkart for internships. Naukri/LinkedIn for entry roles. Freelance: ProBlogger Job Board, Contena, Fiverr. Apply directly to digital agencies, ed-tech companies, news portals.
job_categories.interview_prep: Bring writing samples. Be ready to write a 200-word article on any given topic in 15 minutes during interview. Practice timed writing.
job_categories.realistic_timeline: 2-4 hours daily: 2-3 months of focused practice to first paid work.

job_categories.label: Graphic Designer / UI-UX Designer
job_categories.min_qualification: Any degree OR strong design portfolio
job_categories.description: Creates visual communication — logos, social media graphics, app interfaces, marketing materials. UI-UX (user experience design) is a higher-paying specialisation.

how_to_learn.note: Official free tutorials from Canva. Learn every feature.

how_to_learn.resource: Canva Pro (free for students via .edu email)
how_to_learn.note: Get Canva Pro free if you have any student email. Unlocks premium templates.

skills.self_test: Design a complete brand identity (logo, 5 social media posts, business card) for a fictional local business. Share on Behance.
skills.paid_option: None needed — Canva Free is sufficient to start

how_to_learn.note: Official Figma tutorials. Complete all beginner and intermediate playlists.
Best YouTube channel for practical UI/UX design projects.
Study how professional designers structure their files. Copy and learn.

skills.self_test: Design the UI screens for a mobile app (5-10 screens) in Figma. Publish to Figma Community. That is your portfolio.
skills.paid_option: Google UX Design Professional Certificate on Coursera — ₹4,000 for 6 months — very job-credible

how_to_learn.note: Official Adobe tutorials — the best place to start.
GIMP is a completely free Photoshop alternative. Good enough for most graphic design work.

skills.self_test: Photo retouch + color grade one image. If the result looks professional, you know enough Photoshop basics.
skills.paid_option: Adobe Creative Cloud ₹1,675/month — worthwhile only if you have freelance clients paying

how_to_learn.note: Covers colour theory and typography practically.
Best design thinking channel. Especially for freelance designers wanting to charge more.

skills.self_test: Given two designs — one amateur and one professional — can you explain exactly why one looks better? If yes, you have developed design taste.
skills.paid_option: None needed

job_categories.portfolio_requirement: Behance profile with 5-8 projects: logo design, social media campaign, UI mockup, poster/banner design. Quality matters enormously. 5 excellent projects beat 20 mediocre ones.
job_categories.first_job_path: Internshala for design internships. Fiverr/99designs for freelance. LinkedIn and Behance portfolio are essential. Apply to digital agencies, advertising firms, startups.
job_categories.interview_prep: Portfolio review is the interview. Be ready to explain every design decision: 'I chose this font because...' 'This color palette communicates...'
job_categories.realistic_timeline: 3-5 hours daily: 4-6 months to first paid freelance work. 6-9 months to full-time entry job.

job_categories.label: Bank / Finance / Insurance Executive
job_categories.min_qualification: Any graduation (Commerce preferred but not mandatory)
job_categories.description: Works in banking, insurance, mutual funds, NBFCs. Customer-facing and back-office roles across India's large BFSI sector.

how_to_learn.note: Read RBI monthly bulletins. Understand repo rate, inflation, monetary policy basics.
Best free banking awareness YouTube content in India.
Free from NCERT — covers Indian economy, banking, and financial system fundamentals.

skills.self_test: Can you explain: What is CRR, SLR, Repo Rate, Reverse Repo Rate, NBFC, NPA in simple language? If yes, your banking awareness is interview-ready.
skills.paid_option: None needed

how_to_learn.note: Best Excel tutorials for finance and banking work scenarios.

skills.self_test: Build a personal budget tracker with automated formulas. If you can do it without tutorials, your Excel is sufficient.
skills.paid_option: None needed

how_to_learn.note: Best free English speaking confidence channel. Very practical.
Free public speaking practice. Raipur has active chapters.

skills.self_test: Practice a 2-minute bank product pitch in front of a mirror or phone camera. Watch it back. Are you confident and clear?
skills.paid_option: None needed

how_to_learn.note: Official study material free to download. NISM Series VA exam fee: ₹1,500.

skills.self_test: Take NISM Series VA mock test online. If scoring 70%+, you are ready for the actual exam.
skills.paid_option: NISM Series VA exam: ₹1,500 — mandatory for mutual fund distribution roles. Worth doing.

job_categories.portfolio_requirement: NISM/AMFI certificate (if targeting mutual fund/investment roles) + any banking exam score card (even attempt, shows seriousness) + Excel-based financial analysis sample.
job_categories.first_job_path: Walk-in to local bank branches for Relationship Executive/Assistant roles. HDFC, ICICI, Axis Bank career pages. NBFCs: Bajaj Finance, Mahindra Finance, L&T Finance career pages. These hire constantly.
job_categories.interview_prep: Know basic financial products (FD, RD, savings account interest, loan types). Know RBI Governor name, current repo rate, recent banking news.
job_categories.realistic_timeline: 2-4 hours daily: 2-3 months to first interview-ready. Banking exam (IBPS) prep: 8-12 months additional for govt bank jobs.

job_categories.label: Government Administrative / Clerical Jobs
job_categories.description: Central and state government clerical, assistant, and administrative roles through SSC, CGVYAPAM, State PSCs. Pension, job security, respect.

how_to_learn.note: Best free SSC Maths YouTube channel. Daily classes on all topics.
The standard SSC/Banking Maths textbook. Work through every chapter with solutions.
Practice under real time pressure — this is how you build speed.

skills.self_test: Score 35+/50 on a timed QA mock test. This is the SSC CGL Tier 1 QA benchmark.
skills.paid_option: Oliveboard Premium ₹2,000/year — the best paid mock test platform for govt exams

how_to_learn.note: Best free reasoning YouTube channel for SSC/Banking.

how_to_learn.resource: RS Aggarwal Modern Approach to Verbal Reasoning
how_to_learn.note: Standard reasoning textbook. Do every topic — puzzles, seating, blood relations, coding.

skills.self_test: Complete reasoning section of any previous SSC CGL Tier 1 paper in 25 minutes. If you score 22+/25, you are ready.
skills.paid_option: None needed — books + free YouTube is the standard

how_to_learn.note: SSC English tricks — spotting errors, fill in the blanks, idioms.
Reading quality English daily improves comprehension speed naturally.

skills.self_test: Score 18+/25 in the English section of any previous SSC CGL paper.
skills.paid_option: None needed

how_to_learn.note: Best free daily current affairs for SSC/Banking/UPSC.
Standard static GK book for all government exams. Read entire book once.

skills.self_test: Score 20+/25 in GK section of any previous SSC CGL paper from last year.
skills.paid_option: None needed

how_to_learn.note: Free typing practice with speed tracking. Best free typing trainer.
Test your exact WPM. Track progress every week.

skills.self_test: Take a timed typing test on 10FastFingers. 35+ WPM English = SSC LDC/CHSL typing test ready.
skills.paid_option: None needed

job_categories.portfolio_requirement: No portfolio needed. Score cards from mock tests to track your own progress. CGVYAPAM patwari/teacher applications: academic certificates + CTET/TET certificate.
job_categories.first_job_path: Register on ssc.gov.in, ibps.in, vyapam.cgstate.gov.in. Set email alerts for new notifications. Apply to every exam you are eligible for. Volume of applications matters.
job_categories.interview_prep: SSC CGL has no interview. IBPS has 15-minute interview — know basic banking/GK. State PSC interviews: know your state + your role.
job_categories.realistic_timeline: 4-6 hours daily: 8-12 months of consistent preparation for SSC CGL. CGVYAPAM state exams: 6-8 months.

job_categories.label: Teacher / Educator (School / Online)
job_categories.min_qualification: Graduation + B.Ed (for formal schools) / Any graduation for online tutoring
job_categories.description: One of the most impactful and stable careers in India. Private schools, government schools, online tutoring, EdTech — all growing rapidly.

how_to_learn.note: Mandatory foundation. Know your subject from Class 6 to Class 12 NCERT completely.
Government of India free courses with certificates. Excellent for subject depth.

skills.self_test: Can you teach a complete lesson on any topic from Class 10 on the spot without preparation? If yes, your subject knowledge is sufficient.
skills.paid_option: None needed for school level

how_to_learn.note: Free official CTET preparation material. Covers child psychology, learning theories, pedagogy.
Government of India free teacher training app with thousands of modules.

skills.self_test: Explain Vygotsky's Zone of Proximal Development + Piaget's stages in simple language. Can you connect these to real classroom situations? Interview-ready.
skills.paid_option: B.Ed degree ₹30,000-1,00,000 — mandatory for government school positions

how_to_learn.note: Free Google Educator certification. Strong credential for private school applications.

skills.self_test: Conduct one complete online class using Google Meet + Classroom. If students can follow and learn, you are digitally ready.
skills.paid_option: None needed

how_to_learn.note: Apply to become a paid Unacademy educator. Earn ₹10,000-5,00,000/month based on subscribers.

how_to_learn.resource: YouTube teaching channels (reference: CG exam, Physics Wallah)
how_to_learn.note: Study how successful educator YouTubers structure their content and build audience.

skills.self_test: Record a 5-minute lesson video on your phone. Watch it back. Would you learn from this teacher? Honest self-assessment.
skills.paid_option: None needed to start

job_categories.portfolio_requirement: B.Ed degree + CTET/State TET certificate + 3 lesson plans written in formal format + any teaching experience (even private tuitions count). Government school: all above mandatory.
job_categories.first_job_path: Private school: walk-in with resume + sample lesson. Government school: CGVYAPAM / state recruitment notification. Online: Unacademy Educator programme, Vedantu Teacher Partner, Byju's Teacher hiring.
job_categories.interview_prep: Be ready to teach a demo class on any topic in your subject for 5-10 minutes. Prepare 2-3 lesson plans in advance.
job_categories.realistic_timeline: With B.Ed (2 years) + CTET (8-12 months prep): total 3-4 years for government school. Private school: 1-2 months if you can teach well.
